name: Schwab Get Aggregate Positions Test
description: Test case for retrieving aggregated Schwab positions across all accounts via schwab_get_aggregate_positions

parts.text: Show me my aggregated Schwab positions across all accounts.

Here are your aggregated Schwab positions across all accounts:

* **AAPL**: 10 shares total, Avg Cost: $150.00
* **MSFT**: 5 shares total, Avg Cost: $280.00
* **Total Invested**: $2,900.00
* **Status**: success
